mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{leaveType}, #{reason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{proofUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status, submitted_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status, submitted_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC

SELECT lr.id AS request_id, lr.status, lr.leave_type, DATE_FORMAT(lr.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS end_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS submitted_at, la.action AS latest_action, la.comment AS latest_comment, DATE_FORMAT(la.acted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS latest_acted_at FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN leave_approval la ON la.id = ( SELECT id FROM leave_approval x WHERE x.leave_request_id = lr.id ORDER BY x.acted_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE lr.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY lr.submitted_at DESC
SELECT id, student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status, submitted_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY submitted_at ASC
SELECT id, student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status, submitted_at, updated_at FROM leave_request ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
